productDisplayName: Spinn Women Alliance Black Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteCreated for today's generation, this spinn Alliance shoe embodies the brand's motto - combining technology and high-octane fashion. We think these are just right, both for Sports and for braving the urban jungle, thanks to their nonchalantly sturdy aesthetic. An all-weather staple, the style perfectly suits the cosmopolitan vibe you love!Product DetailsRound toed shoe with a low ankle and central lace ups and overlays ay the midfootPadded tongue and inner (with mesh)Foamy rubber midsoleTPU outsole with circualr nubs all overMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
